title: Frontend WebSocket Frame
description: Any inbound frame on the platform-to-SPA WebSocket fan-out: one of the four known frame types, or an envelope-carrying frame with an unknown type that the client ignores for forward compatibility. Known branches are strict; the unknown branch only validates the shared envelope and a non-known type discriminator.

oneOf.title: Unknown Forward-Compatible Frame
oneOf.description: A future frame type unknown to this contract version. Consumers validate the common envelope, see that the type is not one they understand, and ignore the frame.
